block_03: Nike, Inc. is expected to report Q3 earnings tonight after markets close. Should the results exceed expectations, it could give shares a boost.
block_05: Nike. Inc. stock price performance YTD courtesy of
block_07: 2019 has been positive for Nike so far, with shares surging nearly 20% year to date. The sportswear giant’s incredible rally may see even more momentum: analysts expect strong quarterly numbers.
block_08: If Nike impresses, shares could continue on an uptrend. However, if it disappoints, NKE stock might take a hit.
block_10: *Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results.
